reviews.review_description: Locomotion Devs back at it again with another solid game! A massive-scale city rivaling the size of Skyrim’s map in a multiplayer environment with all the power to swap different movement skills and damage abilities? COUNT ME IN! The gameplay is very fluid, the combinations of movement and damage abilities puts the power right where it belongs— in the hands of the players! AND THEY’RE GOING TO RELEASE MORE THAN 50+ POWERS! These guys are NUTS just giving us a game like this for free!

No this ain’t a review that a character in this game is smashable (it ain’t that kind of “hear me out”)cuz I mean… cmon. But, I have a w idea that might take a while to make. Would if they added cutscenes for whenever a hero and villain fight, kinda like in all the battle grounds games in Roblox. It’d lowkenuenly be so fricken tuff and the cutscene would depend on what power ur using. Anyway, juz thought it’d be a w idea, w game, col powers, and make sure u play as villain to be a superhero in gta. 🦶🦤

reviews.review_title: I’ve spent about $180 on this free game.
reviews.review_description: I like this game. And the chat like this game so every pack that comes out I buy and tell them how it is. I can’t lie, I almost cried when I saw the sparks from dragging the lightsabers, I love the detail they put into every power. People say it’s a cash crab and even if it is, it’s still a great game.

Can you make it so that certain powers have certain special abilities? like giant should be able to grab cars and stuff because they're giant. Wings could be made more like a pheonix so they should be able to heal as they're taking damage, like they are actively healing all the time. Whether they are an upgrade or come with the power, please add something like this for the movement powers.

I got mic banned for an hour for my brother saying the word retard in the background and I was like ok that’s fine and then I said stupid banned for two hours I was I little frustrated and I get unmic banned and 8 minutes later I say dumb and my mic GETS BANNED FOR 3 HOURS THIS GAME IS HORRIBLE

reviews.review_title: The game is very fun, but too grindy.
reviews.review_description: I've been enjoying this game since the day.It came out and it is a very fun experience all around.I only have one complaint.The game is just too grindy. You need To do so much grinding, to get the last power upgrade. And honestly, I just wish it was less expensive, but it's an all around good game.

reviews.review_title: This has me coming back every time!
reviews.review_description: I found this game because of UG’ promo on this game. This game has so many unique powers that are so fun to use! Like you can become a necromancer with dark magic or a temu iron man with laser beams OR a colossal  TITAN, or you can pair movement and ￼attack powers to basically become GOD. In conclusion this is one of the best games I have ever played. I highly recommend!

I would give a 5 star, but I can't because I kill a boss in 5 minutes just so the money can despawn so please make the money despawn time like 5 minutes or something because I kill a boss the money despawns and I have ti fo it again and again and again and I'm getting irritated

This game makes EA look like the good guys 


Riddled with micro transactions at $44.99 a pop and is littered with 5 year old kids. Good concept but lacking a lot of gameplay definitely should be free but in no way shape or form worth any transaction over $10 let alone $44.99. 

Seems it may be a game developer has made to get kids to spend adults money.

Very sad an greedy. Do better

(Edit fir reply) what a bunch of whooie! 
Do you really believe you arent doing a cash grab and being greedy as all hell here? Like seriously??. 

Slow game progression. Nothing to really even do so the game play gets stale and repeatable in the first 5 min of playing, you also forgot to add that your packages in game premote to coin packs due to the slow earning of money in your game and can planly see how yiu guys want to earn money.  

Nearly as bad or on par with COD's micro transaction store. 

Be better developers and know and do better. 

Adding to part of a problem gamers hate and developers abuse. Tsk tsk tsk.

developer_response.body:
Hi GotToBeMad,

I'm sorry you don't enjoy Super City or the way we operate as developers. Not every game is for everyone. I don't see how we're even close to comparable to EA or COD considering our previous explanations on how many ways there are to earn currency for free in game and that 95% of the content can be earned for free in a reasonable amount of time. 

Think of how EA's The Sims 4 franchise (The Sims 4 being a free game) operates, in order to get all of their content in game which includes many different types of functional content, gameplay changes, new game systems, etc (not just cosmetics), it would cost around $1,500. Additionally, there's NO WAY to earn *ANY* of it for free. You must purchase it with real life money, no if, ands, or buts. There's no currency you can earn in game by playing to use instead. 

You couldn't even spend close to that in Super City, we don't have enough content for that. The vast majority of what we do have is cosmetics only, not gameplay related. No one would want that many cosmetics. The powers being the only thing relating to game function that costs in-game gold. And again, 95% of ALL cosmetics, powers, or other in game purchases can be earned FOR FREE with minimal gameplay, as well as you starting with some gold and powers to begin with. 

All free to play games have in game purchases of some kind. Developers cannot, and will not, work for free, same as you wouldn't in whatever career field you choose. I would love to just have do a paid game, but that is not what the players are asking for. The way we are now has 95%-97% of the playerbase play **100% for free** and enjoy themselves doing so. The other 5% - 3% that willingly choose to support us is what allows us as developers to continue working on the game. 

If you have genuine suggestions on how you personally would improve the monetization system, we'd love to hear it, email us at support@locomotiondevs.com or reach out on our Discord https://discord.gg/tqPj7xvdRP . We consider all suggestions.

reviews.review_description:
It’s a great game it’s just the muting system is WAY too sensitive. Me and 2 other guys I was playing with,we all got muted for no reason. The first guy got muted for 1 hour because of “hatred speech” even though he was just screaming while running away from the boss. Then I got muted for “hatred speech” because I kept dying to the boss and I said “bro I keep dying to this boss” then I got muted for 4 HOURS!!! Then the last guy was just trying to figure out how 
long we were muted for then got muted for 2 hours. Pls fix this super city,but  I do like the game though.

I love the game but I have one request: PLEASE BRING BACK THE DEV POWERS. I was in a server and this one guy was flexing and bragging that he had dev wings. Maybe you could have them be 5000 coins instead on 1000 and that would probably be balanced I want to see what things like dev ranger or dev giant. Please, if it’s not to much to ask for, bring them back.

I absolutely love this game other then it gets annoying that once you defeat a boss then sometimes you don’t even get your money and your money has to find you so you have to hang around after you kill it which makes it hard if you did most the damage and have 6 stars. The game also is REALLY annoying when you have 9 year olds screaming into the mic bc they love their own voice. At that point you can’t even hear the game but instead all you hear are kids screaming and it gave me a headache.

It’s like good but the voice mod AI voice patrol moderation thinks that “fricking” is hate. I have now been banned for nine hours for saying the smallest thing ever. You could give the mic to a baby and it would ban you for the sounds ￼that it makes. Might as well just mute yourself because it’s going to happen eventually.￼

When I first booted up the game, it was ok until I finished tutorial. All I heard were little kids. The game how I see is grindy. In addition, I know you devs created Elements Divided but why are you using its sound effects? Because I have played that game, too, but why using its sounds directly instead of changing them or using other sounds?

I hope you are having a wonderful time with the game. It sounds like a truly engaging experience. The inclusion of mech hands adds a unique and exciting dimension to the gameplay. I trust it offers a rich and immersive world for you to explore. Thank you for sharing your positive sentiments about it.

I haven’t played VR since December 2024, and it’s June 2026. I downloaded a bunch of these recently popular games like UG, HeroXHero, and Fros,￼ thinking they were going to be fun. But of these Gorilla Tag inspired locomotion games usually suck. Until Super City.

Super City is genuinely fun because of the grind to get better powers, and the result of having better powers and shredding through bosses is really satisfying.

Thank you for bringing some sort of hope into the community.￼￼￼

reviews.review_title: Amazing concept, not so great execution
reviews.review_description: I like this game, it is really unique and I could play on long sessions, but I feel like I'm playing on hard-core mode all the time, you die way too fast and the enemies have aimbot, can kill you in an instant, another thing, the money bubbles the float to you, they take too long to reach you, sometimes not even reaching me, I'd like it better if it just ended up in my wallet or something better. I need some improvements to like the game a bit better.

reviews.review_title: IN GAME PURCHASE DID NOT WORK!!
reviews.review_description: I attempted to buy a unicorn outfit from the pet store for my daughter. The transaction went through and the purchase states it is 'unlocked' but I don't have access to it. So essentially I've had the cash defrauded from my bank account. DO NOT MAKE ANY IN GAME PURCHASES you will lose your cash. Scammers!

developer_response.body: Hi, I'm not sure what happened there, but we'd be happy to look into this for you, please email support@locomotiondevs.com .

reviews.review_title: Great game to play with friends
reviews.review_description: When I play with my friends on this game I just have so much fun trying to get five stars and then when we do, we use some in the boss so we can fight it in when our headset dies. We’re so sad that we can’t play with each other.  Because this game is the best game I have it really makes me spend a lot more time with my friends. ￼￼it just an amazing game to play with a friend.

it wobbles and makes people who have never got sick from a game in their life puke and the only fun aspect (the bosses) despawn 2 seconds when your not touching their butt. I hope you 2 year olds spend 5 minutes in the game before writeing a 5 star review.

reviews.review_title: Literally the best free game of all time
reviews.review_description: Most of the free games i had installed in the past, either had a bad and toxic player base, or just wasn't good in general. But this game is WAY different from those other games. Sure, it has a lot of little kids, but the older people are very nice to them, including my self. The content for this game is limitless. There is so much to do, destroyable environments, endless enemies, a bunch of abilities with lots of combinations. Greatest free game ever.

reviews.review_title: THIS GAME IS A BIG BIG W
reviews.review_description: My first time playing the game was not to bad I went through the tutorial and everything but I still didn’t know everything so I left and deleted it. BUT WAIT THERES A TWIST! I started playing HERO X HERO and I got pretty good at it ( I can’t even defeat level 15 boss) but i noticed something. If HERO X HERO had powers in the game, i thought if I can supercity to its full potential it was be really fun as that game. I was wrong…. This game was 10 TIMES BETTER. This is my new favorite game and I just want to say thank you. Locomotion devs. You guys did great, good, amazing, supercalifragilisticexpialidocious do I have to say anything else? ( yes I 100% do) but I’d like to give a  big thank you for all your works. Sincerely- Jp.0902

These devs suck because to get more gold for powers you need to buy and packs 30 dollars all you want is money that is a reason why you don’t care about use you care about money and this game is boring with the same enemies I only play this game for a hour and got bored

free for a reason that you'll learn the MOMENT you pass tutorial and hit the lobby

children screaming whatever brain rot is funny that week, roblox-esque colored up micro transaction booths selling the premium currency at the price of a full game (~$15 up to an eye watering $30), no sense of direction on what to do.

if you don't immediately back out and the sight and sound of all that, you'll learn the game essentially demands you pay for premium currency, or else enemies will utterly lay waste to you

for starters, the accuracy on these guys make bedrock skeletons look blind. They just about don't miss, and the damage isn't scaled down to compensate. Once they show up its pretty much time to tuck tail and scramble back to HQ so you don't lose the very small amount of money you collected.

and whats most disappointing... Its kina fun.. But the enjoyment is snuffed out entirely by it all.

Jesus this game is so good I can’t even put it into words. Beta access was great, gameplay is great, killing innocent pedestrians and naming yourself a villain to feel justified is great, and watching the fights between two supertitans  is awesome, great job devs!

A master piece of a game no i am not glazing its just that good perfect just perfect the game is a work of art you were right your so right the only reason im alive is because you didn’t chop my head off as gojo once said

developer_response.body: Hi Braykesha, we're sorry to hear you didn't enjoy your experience in Super City. If what you're looking for is an avatar inspired game, with more elements, learning skills and mastering, you might try our other multiplayer Quest game, Elements Divided. If you need any more help or have suggestions for us, feel free to email us support@locomotiondevs.com or join the Discord for Super City  https://discord.gg/tqPj7xvdRP or Elements Divided https://discord.gg/Mhekcm3HrA
